nasb.text: They will say, ‘This desolate land has become like the garden of Eden; and the waste, desolate and ruined cities are fortified and inhabited.’

esv.text: And they will say, ‘This land that was desolate has become like the garden of Eden, and the waste and desolate and ruined cities are now fortified and inhabited.’

cnv.text: 他們必說：“先前這荒涼之地，現在竟像伊甸園一樣；這些廢棄、荒涼、毀壞了的城市，現在卻成了堅固城，有人居住了。”

ccb.text: 他们会说，以前的荒凉之地如今竟变得像伊甸园，被毁坏废弃的荒凉城邑已经设防，有人居住。
